_comment: Assertion contract for the M2.1 audio pipeline. The synthetic camera's audio is a 1 kHz sine at 16 kHz mono; the extractor delivers 1.0s (16000-sample) s16le windows. Both the pure-sine reference WAV and the live AAC-decoded tap measure ~1e9 dominance and ~2894 RMS, so these bounds have orders of magnitude of headroom and stay green across ffmpeg versions.
